name: tokenizer42
description: Professional ERC20 token implementation for the 42 Tokenizer project

scripts.test: npm run copy && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules hardhat test --network hardhat
scripts.test:coverage: npm run copy && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules hardhat coverage
scripts.deploy: npm run copy && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules hardhat run deploy.js --network hardhat
scripts.deploy:bsc: npm run copy && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules hardhat run deploy.js --network bscTestnet
scripts.deploy:sepolia: npm run copy && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules hardhat run deploy.js --network sepolia
scripts.interact: npm run copy && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules hardhat run interact.js --network hardhat
scripts.compile: npm run copy && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules hardhat compile
scripts.console: npm run copy && cross-env NODE_PATH=./node_modules hardhat console --network hardhat

author: 42 Student
